Name: Town Twinning Between Türkiye and The EU - II For a Green Future
Description: Town-twinning activities bring cities/provinces closer to one another, contributing to multiple dimensions of their development in a participatory and inclusive manner. Local diplomacy and cooperation are major components of the internationalisation of local authorities and one of the driving forces behind Türkiye’s integration with the EU. The TT-II aims to enable exchange and cooperation between Turkish local authorities and the EU counterparts on climate and environment-based actions. This will further pave the way for strengthening capacities of local authorities in Türkiye and enhancing dialogue between Turkish and EU local authorities. In other words, climate and environment-based actions will constitute a tool for strengthening the capacities of local administrative authorities and through twinning schemes, enable exchange of knowledge and experience with the EU counterparts.TT-II provides an opportunity for local authorities already motivated by the grant scheme and flexible non-financial support mechanism towards mobility and networking support. TT-II will create bilateral and multilateral communications and visibility base in Türkiye regarding major EU networks of local authorities and raise awareness further.TT-II will support the actions of the Turkish local authorities in cooperation with EU counterparts to analyse their climate and environment-related problems and develop common solutions, while also enhancing their capacities in line with the concept of ‘Green Future’, which is one of the common fundamental principles recognised by the EU, Member States and local authorities.

Name: Small Business Center at Johnston Community College
Description: The Small Business Center at Johnston Community College is part of the North Carolina Small Business Center Network.  Our goal is to provide local entrepreneurs and small business owners in Johnston County with resources to help their businesses succeed.

Name: CAMEP BENIN
Description:
Favoriser une société plus résiliente et inclusive en offrant aux jeunes et aux femmes les moyens de participer pleinement à la vie économique et civique.
Membre de L'UNION DE LA NOUVELLE GÉNÉRATION EUROPÉENNE ET AFRICAINE UNGAE

Name: LEADER Drenthe
Description:
LEADER is een Europese subsidie voor plattelandsontwikkeling van onderop. 

Organisaties, dorpsverenigingen, ondernemers en samenwerkingsverbanden met een goed idee voor hun leefomgeving kunnen hiervoor subsidie. 

Het idee moet bijdragen aan een van de doelen uit de Lokale Ontwikkelingsstrategie: 
1 Toekomstgerichte economie
2 Samen leven & wonen 
3 Versterken biodiversiteit en landschapskwaliteit
4 Klimaatadaptatie en duurzaamheid

Meer weten over de mogelijkheden? Kijk op onze website: www.leaderdrenthe.nl  Hier vind je alle informatie over de doelen, hoe LEADER werkt, welke stappen je kunt zetten en natuurlijk hoe je ons kunt bereiken. 

We horen graag van je! 

LEADER Drenthe bestaat uit twee gebieden: Oost-Drenthe en West-Drenthe. Samen beslaan ze het hele platteland van de provincie, met uitzondering van de HEMA-kernen (het stedelijk gebied van Hoogeveen, Emmen, Meppel en Assen). 
In de communicatie werken beide LEADER-gebieden samen.
 
Europees Landbouwfonds voor plattelandsontwikkeling: Europa investeert in zijn platteland

Description:
Organisation a but non lucratif qui a pour mission d'aider la jeunesse féminine a se réaliser.

Name: CAADS-Ambassadeurs de l'Accès Aux Droits Sociaux
Description:
Dans le cadre de la lutte contre le non-recours aux droits sociaux, l'association Participation et Fraternité, soutenue par la DREETS et le Pacte des solidarités, conçoit, déploie et anime la formation-action des Ambassadeurs de l’Accès aux Droits Sociaux » (CAADS). 
Cette formation permet la montée en compétences, de personnes connaissant ou ayant connu des situations de précarité, et de référents de confiance. 
Les ambassadeurs des droits sont ainsi outillés pour aller vers et guider les personnes en non-recours. Les ambassadeurs s’appuient sur un maillage de confiance et une communauté pour lever les freins et permettre aux personnes en situation de non-recours de rejoindre les dispositifs d’accès aux droits sociaux et à l’insertion.

Name: Abili-Tech Systems
Description:
Abili-Tech Systems Inc. is a groundbreaking ASL translation app designed to bridge the communication gap between Sign language users and those who use Spoken language. It provides a seamless translation from Sign language to both Spoken and Text, vice versa and between different Sign languages.
Abili-Tech is not just a technological innovation; it's a tool for social progress. It plays a crucial role in promoting inclusive education and lifelong learning and reducing disparities, particularly for individuals with hearing impairments. Abili-Tech enhances access to education, employment, and social inclusion while also increasing awareness and understanding of the deaf community's needs. 
In today's digital era, Abili-Tech embodies the transformative power of technology in our lives. It serves as a catalyst for change, significantly contributing to the achievement of two United Nations Sustainable Development Goals: SDG 4, which focuses on ensuring inclusive and equitable quality education and promoting lifelong learning opportunities, and SDG 10, aimed at reducing inequalities.
As we harness technology's potential to create a more inclusive world, Abili-Tech exemplifies what innovation and collaboration can achieve in our collective pursuit of a better future for all.

Name: OSAN POVU NIAN, JERE HO DI'AK (PFMO)
Description:
Financiado pela União Europeia e cofinanciado e gerido pelo Camões, Instituto da Cooperação e da Língua, I.P. o projeto "Parceria para a melhoria da prestação de serviços através do reforço da Gestão e Supervisão das Finanças Públicas em Timor-Leste" (PFMO) é um dos mais amplos programas de apoio e capacitação institucional em Timor-Leste.
O Objetivo Geral do PFMO consiste em melhorar o desenvolvimento sustentável em Timor-Leste através de uma prestação de serviços públicos mais eficaz, íntegra, transparente, responsável e orientada para o cidadão, em linha com o Plano Estratégico de Desenvolvimento 2011-2030.
O seu Objetivo Específico consiste em reforçar o planeamento, a gestão, a auditoria, a monitoria, a responsabilização e a supervisão do uso das finanças públicas para uma melhor prestação de serviços públicos.
Para tanto o PFMO desenvolve ações de apoio e reforço da capacidade dos atores estatais (Parlamento Nacional, Câmara de Contas, Comissão Anticorrupção, Polícia Científica de Investigação Criminal, Inspeção-Geral do Estado, Ministério das Finanças e Ministério da Justiça) e não-estatais (organizações da sociedade civil e órgãos de comunicação social) de modo a que possam participar plenamente no processo de tomada de decisão e de supervisão do uso das finanças públicas, melhorando o desempenho do sistema de pesos e contrapesos, para uma melhor prestação dos serviços públicos.
Valor de financiamento: 12,6 milhões de euros.

Name: KRAM
Description:
Hos KRAM arbejder vi for at skabe trygge, nærværende og meningsfulde indsatser for børn, unge og familier i sårbare livssituationer.

Vi tilbyder fleksible og helhedsorienterede socialpædagogiske løsninger i tæt samarbejde med kommuner og andre fagprofessionelle – altid med fokus på relationer, faglighed og tillid.

Vores mission er at bygge bro til et bedre liv – ét menneske, én indsats og én relation ad gangen. Vi tror på, at alle stemmer har værdi, og at målrettede, tillidsfulde indsatser kan skabe varig forandring.

Vores tilgang tager udgangspunkt i konteksten og behovene i den enkelte sag. Vi benytter blandt andet MI (Motiverende Samtaler), støttende samtaler og kommunikationstrekanten som metoder – men altid med blik for, hvad der virker bedst for det menneske, vi står overfor.

KRAM er et mangfoldigt og fagligt stærkt team, hvor flere sprog og kulturel forståelse er en naturlig del af vores fundament.

Vores vision er at skabe en ny fremtid – hvor hver indsats tæller, og hver stemme bliver hørt og anerkendt.

**Job/ Career Seeking Services- Job Search Assistance, Resume & Interview Preparation, Career Pathways Workshops, Training & Certification Programs, Employer Connections, Unemployment Services, Community Resource Navigation, and more.**

**Employer Services- Recruitment Assistance, Onboarding Best Practices,  Exclusive Hiring Event Access, Training and Retention Strategies, Business Solutions Programs, Labor Market Data Access, Industry Sector Connections, Platforms For Industry Influence, Community Partnerships, Financial Incentives, Youth and Educators Connection, Economic Support Services, and more.**

Funded by the Pacific Mountain Workforce Development Council, WorkSource is an equal opportunity employer/program. Auxiliary aids and services are available upon request to individuals with disabilities. WA Relay 711.

Description:
Är du idag arbetslös och inskriven på Arbetsförmedlingen? Hos Match And Move erbjuder vi Rusta och Matcha, en tjänst designad för att hjälpa dig framåt. Rusta och Matcha handlar om att ge dig de verktyg och den vägledning du behöver för att lyckas på arbetsmarknaden. 

Vi anpassar stödet efter dig – dina mål, dina behov.

I korthet innebär Rusta att vi förbereder dig genom utbildning och personlig utveckling. Matcha delen fokuserar sedan på att hitta den perfekta arbetsplatsen eller utbildningen för just dig. Vårt team i Match And Move är här för att stötta dig genom hela processen, från start till mål.

Name: Europ Assistance Middle East
Description:
𝗔𝗯𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝗘𝘂𝗿𝗼𝗽 𝗔𝘀𝘀𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗚𝗿𝗼𝘂𝗽
Founded in 1963 in France, Europ Assistance is a global leader in assistance and travel insurance, serving over 300 million customers worldwide. With 12,000 employees across 37 countries, we provide a wide range of services including travel and medical assistance, roadside and mobility assistance, and home and family protection. Our mission, “you live we care,” drives us to bring people from distress to relief anytime, anywhere, empowered by our dedicated team and innovative technology.
𝗘𝘂𝗿𝗼𝗽 𝗔𝘀𝘀𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗠𝗶𝗱𝗱𝗹𝗲 𝗘𝗮𝘀𝘁
Since our establishment in 1994, Europ Assistance Middle East has been dedicated to providing exceptional assistance and travel insurance services across the region. With offices in the United Arab Emirates, Bahrain, and Jordan, we proudly serve eight diverse markets: UAE, Bahrain, Qatar, Oman, Kuwait, Saudi Arabia, Jordan, and Lebanon. Our commitment to the Middle East is reflected in our tailored services that cater to the unique needs of our clients and communities.
𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗽𝗮𝗻𝘆 𝘃𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻 is to prove every day that we are the most reliable care company in the world, and to make our people proud of who we are, what we do, and how we do it. 
"𝗖𝗔𝗥𝗘" is not just a promise, it’s how we work together and with our customers and business partners. It means that we are Caring, Available, Reliable and Easy to work with. Every day, our employees bring these values to life.

Name: Riktning Norr
Description: Riktning Norr erbjuder individanpassade behandlingsinsatser för ungdomar i hemmet eller i familjehem – som ett alternativ till HVB och SiS, eller som ett komplement till socialtjänstens befintliga insatser. Vi arbetar nära ungdomen i den miljö de redan befinner sig i, med fokus på relation, förändring och långsiktigt stöd. Våra insatser riktar sig både till ungdomar i riskzon och till dem med utvecklad kriminalitet, missbruk, trauma eller destruktiva nätverk. Vi använder metoder som MI, rePULSE, Kriminalitet som livsstil (KSL) och Lifespan Integration (LI). Vi har lång erfarenhet från HVB, missbruksvård, kriminalvård och avhopparverksamhet. Vi tror på strukturerad behandling – utan att rycka upp ungdomen från sin vardag.

Name: OyunMu
Description:
Neler Yapıyoruz ?
Oyunun gücüne inanıyoruz. Ne yaparsak oyunla yapıyoruz.

Atölyeler; Çocuklar İçin, Tasarım-Oyun Atölyeleri, Yetişkinler İçin,Oyun Atölyeleri.
Yayınlar; Çocukların Şehri, Çocuk Röportajları, Mimarlarla Masallar, Canlı Yayınlar.

Birleşmiş Milletler ve UNDP ile işbirliği içinde hazırlanan Sürdürülebilir Kalkınma Amaçlarıyla paralel olarak ilerliyor, projelerimizi bu amaçları gözeterek oluşturmaya çalışıyoruz.

Araştır, Sorgula, Üret, Kazan ! 
Çocuklar için tasarladığımız bu eğitim sistemimizde ‘Araştır, Sorgula, Üret, Kazan !’ pratiği küçüklerimize  benimsetilir. Katıldığı her atölyede bir rozet kazanan küçüklerimiz tüm rozetleri tamamlayınca hediyeyi kazanıyorlar. Atölye kataloğumuz oldukça geniştir. Her atölyede farklı bir  konu işlenmektedir. Atölye öğretileri çocuklara oyunlaştırılarak ‘OyunMu Yöntemi’yle aktarılmaktadır.

Yaş Gruplarını 3-6 Yaş, 7-10 Yaş, 11-13 Yaş ŞeklindeFarklı Seanslarla Programa Dahil Ediyoruz.

OyunMu ailesi olarak farklı şehirlerden katılımcılarımızla çevrimiçi ve yüzyüze olmak üzere bir araya gelerek 'OYUN'lar oynuyoruz.Oyun atölyeleri,kamplar ve yayınlar organize ederken bir yandan da kendi oyuncaklarımızı üretiyoruz. HomoLudens serisinin amacı her yaştan insanı 'OYUN'un birleştirici öğretici eğlendirici etkisiyle paylaşım ağı oluşturmaktır.

Mimarizm iş birliğiyle gerçekleştirdiğimiz bu seride mimarlığın doğasında olan 'eleştirme içgüdüsünü‘ masallarla bir araya getiriyoruz. Masalların mimari öğretileri, mekansal algıları, karakter analizleri, olay kurgusu, iyikötü algısı, toplumsal eşitlik konuları, çocuklara kattıkları, çocuklardan aldıkları gibi çeşitli konular bu yayınlarda eleştiriye sunulacak.

bizimle oynamak ister misiniz?

Name: Northampton Speakers
Description:
Are you ready to overcome your fear of public speaking, and develop your communication and leadership skills?

Are you looking for a group of like-minded people to help and support you along your journey to becoming an effective communicator and leader?

Do you want to develop your presentation skills for both virtual and face-to-face platforms?

If you are, then do come along to our local club, Northampton Speakers.

Northampton Speakers is a non-profit organisation dedicated to helping people become confident public speakers, effective communicators and visionary leaders.

It is part of a larger global organisation, Toastmasters International, a world leader in communication and leadership development.

Upon joining our club, not only will you be part of a fun-loving, warm and welcoming group of diverse individuals but you’ll also gain access to the Toastmaster International database of learning resources.

You can progress at your own pace and choose the programme that best matches your goals. You will also be allocated a mentor to guide you along the way.

Whether you’re a professional, an entrepreneur or a student looking to develop your skills, developing communication and leadership skills is essential. 

Attendance is free for guests and open to anyone aged 18 and over.  You'll get the chance to see what the club can do for you and meet existing members.  

The location of our physical meetings is: 
The Charles Bradlaugh,
1 Earl Street, Northampton NN1 3AU

https://www.meetup.com/northampton-speakers/

For more information about our club and how to join please visit:
http://www.northamptonspeakers.org.uk/about

Everyone is welcome!

We look forward to seeing you soon!

Name: Socialassistenten
Description:
Socialassistenten er stiftet med det formål at tilbyde støtte til den skriftlige socialfaglige dokumentation. Jeg står gerne for jeres skriftlige produkter og holder jer lige så gerne i hånden i en proces hvor kvaliteten i skriftligheden skal højnes. 

Skriftlighed indenfor det sociale område er mit hjertebarn. Der kan gøres meget skade ved beskrivelser og de kan i virkeligheden afspejle en medarbejders/organisations menneskesyn.

Mit hjertebarn er en ordentlighed i vores skriftlige praksis, hvor mennesker beskrives med respekt. Derudover står jeg på mål for en "ind-til-benet" tilgang hvor dokumentation er skrevet i menneskesprog.

Og så ELSKER jeg at skrive, det bringer mig altid i flow!

Name: CSF-Cœur Sans Frontières
Description:
Cœur Sans Frontières (CSF)

Depuis 2007, Cœur Sans Frontières (CSF) est une organisation philanthropique active en République Démocratique du Congo, principalement dans les provinces du Nord Kivu et du Sud Kivu. Avec des bureaux à Goma, Beni, Kirumba, et Rusayo, CSF se concentre sur la protection de l'enfance, l'autonomisation des jeunes et des femmes vulnérables, et la promotion de la paix.

Vision : Bâtir une société où les enfants s’épanouissent dans le respect de leurs droits.

Devise : Un cœur, une mission pour un monde nouveau.

Mission : Promotion et protection des droits humains.

Domaines d’intervention :

Protection de l’enfance
Éducation
Réinsertion sociale
Éducation à la santé et nutrition
Promotion agricole
Prévention et transformation des conflits communautaires
Zones opérationnelles :

Nord Kivu : Beni, Lubero, Rutshuru, Nyiragongo, Masisi
Sud Kivu : Kalehe
Valeurs :

Engagement chrétien centré sur le Christ
Collaboration avec acteurs locaux et leaders communautaires
Responsabilité envers la communauté et partenaires
Rôle de conseiller et médiateur
Objectifs :

Promouvoir la paix, la santé, et le développement humain
Assister les enfants et personnes vulnérables
Favoriser l’éducation des enfants
Autonomiser les jeunes et les femmes
Partenaires locaux :

Autorités et leaders locaux
Réseaux communautaires de protection de l’enfance (RECOPE)
Radios communautaires
Groupes de parents

Name: Centro Tecnológico Forestal Maderero
Description:
El CENTRO TECNOLÓGICO FORESTAL MADERERO (CTFM) surge en el marco del Acuerdo de Inversión ROU – UPM, en el que se crea un fideicomiso y el Fondo de Innovación Sectorial (FIS). 

La gobernanza del CTFM está constituida por el Ministerio de Industria, Energía y Minería (MIEM), el Ministerio de Ganadería, Agricultura y Pesca (MGAP, a través de la Dirección General Forestal), la Oficina de Planeamiento y Presupuesto (OPP), la Sociedad de Productores Forestales (SPF) y la Asociación de Empresarios de la Madera y Afines (ADEMA).

La misión del CTFM es promover la articulación y coordinación de todos los actores de la cadena forestal-maderera, identificando desafíos y buscando soluciones innovadoras, mejorando la competitividad e impulsando el desarrollo sostenible.

Name: Bir Kapakla İz Bırak
Description:
Bir Kapakla İz Bırak Sosyal Sorumluluk Projesi; Evlerine hapsolmuş engellilerin tekerlekli sandalyeler aracılığıylabaşta sosyal hayata katılmalarına devamında eğitim, kültürel, mesleki alanlarda var olmalarına katkı sağlamak amacıyla hayata geçirilmiştir. 

2011'den itibaren TOFD tarafından yürütülen Plastik Kapak Kampanyası'nı desteklemek, farkındalığı artırmak amacıyla Ekvator Enerji, İDO ve TOFD iş birliğiyle başlatılan proje kapsamında su şişesi, damacana, meşrubat, yoğurt ve sıvı deterjan kapağı gibi her renk ve her çeşit plastik kapaklar gönüllüler tarafından toplanarak, tekerlekli sandalyeye dönüştürülecek ve ihtiyaç sahiplerine ulaştırılacaktır. Proje kapsamında, Türkiye'nin 81 ilindeki gönüllü iş yeri, ofis, fabrika, alışveriş merkezi, hastane, okul gibi yerlerde konumlandırılacak kapak toplama kutuları aracılığıyla kapakların toplanması, projenin gönüllü ve destekçileriyle birlikte büyümesi hedeflenmektedir.

Name: Rural Access Program (RAP)
Description:
The Rural Access Program (RAP) was established in partnership between the Government of Yemen and the International Development Association (IDA) as a key strategic tool to support the government's Poverty Reduction Strategy. RAP was established by virtue of the decision of the Minister of Public Works and Highways no. 46 of 2001 and the Prime Minister's decree no. 84 of 2001 with the aim of breaking isolation, reducing the effects of poverty, improving the living conditions of the rural population, and working to establish a rural road network linked to the main road network to ensure all- weather access to basic services for the population of rural areas.
RAP works on: Strategic studies, detailed studies and designs, implementation and rehabilitation of rural roads, training and capacity building, and community awareness. RAP aims to contribute to achieving sustainable development through working to best practices and applying international standards for the implementation of rural road projects.

Name: ASHB - Türkiye'deki Mülteciler için Mali Yardım Programı (FRIT) Koordinatörlüğü
BürokratEASY Institut
Description:
BürokratEASY – Digitale Paragrafenwerkstatt für die Staatsmodernisierung. Praxis + KI + Humor. Damit schützen wir die Handlungsfähigkeit von Verwaltung und Wirtschaft.

Deutschland erlebt die größte Herausforderung seit Bestehen der Republik:
Internationale Krisen, Ruhestandswelle und Personalmangel sind wenige beeinflussbar.
Digitaler Rückstand und Bürokratie GAU mit 200.000+ Vorschriften sind hausgemacht.

Was niemand gerne aussprechen will, ist aber da und wächst ungebremst: schwindende Handlungsfähigkeit und ein massives Vollzugsproblem.

BürokratEASY ist der ehrliche Versuch, das zu verhindern.
Staatsmodernisierung mit Hirn, Herz, Humor – und 3 Büroklammern.

Wir verbinden Praxiswissen aus der Verwaltung, digitale Methoden, KI – und eine Prise Humor. Die drei Büroklammern Vera, Alex und Klara (bekannt aus „3 Klammern für Charly“) zeigen mit Charme, Klartext und KI, wo es hakt – und wie es besser geht.
Bottom-Up trifft Top-Down. Menschen + KI. Vorschriftenabbau + Digitalisierung.

Wir arbeiten an drei Zielen:

-25 % Bürokratie – konzentriert auf den gigantischen Bestand an Verwaltungsvorschriften.

- Praxis stärkt Politik – Wissen und Machbarkeit aus den Behörden selbst.

- Handlungsfähigkeit sichern – trotz Ruhestandswelle und Personalmangel.

BürokratEASY ist kein Meckerprojekt.
Es ist eine digitale Paragrafenwerkstatt und ein Klammernetzwerk für die Staatsmodernisierung.

Mit Hirn, Herz, Humor – und 3 Büroklammern.
Geht nicht? Gibt's nicht.

Name: Office of Youth and Young Adult Opportunities, City of Hampton
Description:
The Office of Youth and Young Adult Opportunities ensures that Hampton creates better outcomes for youth and young adults. We strive to provide meaningful alternatives to violence, drugs, and gang participation while addressing unresolved trauma and supporting returning citizens. 

We accomplish this goal by working collaboratively with support agencies and grassroots organizations to provide:

* Transformative mentoring
* Peer & family engagement
* Emotional & social support 
* Restorative & re-entry services
* Workforce readiness & development
* Neighborhood-based programs 
* Crisis intervention & more 

Our team also manages a Summer Youth Employment Program that offers job opportunities within city and school departments, local businesses, and non-profit organizations to youth and young adults in Hampton ages 16-24. The 10-week program provides summer work experiences cultivating professional and personal career aspirations. Interested participants must attend a Hampton city school or be a Hampton resident. 
If you are a local business in the city of Hampton we would love to partner with you on this initiative. Please email Kerri.Thurman@Hampton.gov.

Name: Børns Værdi
Description:
Har du et barn eller en ung med nedsat fysisk eller psykisk funktionsevne? Er dit barn i mistrivsel og behøver støtte? Er dit barn i skolevægring? Så kan vi hjælpe! 
Børns Værdi hjælper mange familier på tværs af landet, med støtte og de rette tilbud, samt den hjælp de har brug for, og ikke mindst har ret til. 
Vi yder juridisk og specialpædagogisk bistand i sager med kommunen, i skolesager, m.m. og sikrer dig fremdrift i din sag og trivsel i familien. 
 

Ring og få en gratis samt uforpligtende samtale med Børns Værdi og lad os afdække jeres behov. 
Sammen finder vi frem til, hvad vi kan hjælpe netop jeres familie med.

Name: EBT Community Council
Description:
The EBT Community Council (ECC) is a community of trusted voices and partnerships in the government payments industry. The ECC is a volunteer-driven group that is focused on sharing EBT insights across programs (SNAP, WIC and beyond!). Our monthly meetings present opportunities for knowledge sharing and collaboration on the topics impacting the EBT community and industry stakeholders, and FNS, as well as how we can work together as a community to ensure EBT solutions remain aligned with technology and innovation.

Mission: The EBT Community Council convenes government and industry stakeholders to actively contribute to a sustainable and forward-looking approach to ideas and technologies affecting electronic payments of government benefits to program recipients.

Name: AL AMINE FUND
Description:
AL AMINE FUND est une structure récemment créée, en Août 2023, pour promouvoir la coopération, le soutien mutuel et l'engagement envers le bien-être collectif au sein de la société. Elle intervient dans la région de Dakar et/ou dans tout le territoire national. Elle est composée de professionnels, d’acteurs de développement, de chefs d’entreprise, d’élèves et d’étudiants. Elle est portée à sa tête par le Président avec ses membres du bureau (divisé en commissions) qui sont engagés et très dynamiques pour mener à bien les activités de la structure et de pouvoir atteindre les objectifs fixés. 
    A travers ce projet, Al Amine Fund espère encourager la solidarité sociale qui est un pilier fondamental d'une société harmonieuse et inclusive, où les individus se sentent responsables les uns envers les autres et travaillent ensemble pour créer un environnement favorable à la prospérité de tous.
    Le but poursuivi par la structure est de distinguer et répondre aux besoins des individus et des groupes qui sont vulnérables ou en difficulté.

Name: Stand by You Ostschweiz
Description:
«Stand by You Ostschweiz» ist 2024 aus der Selbsthilfeorganisation VASK Ostschweiz hervorgegangen. Sie ist die regionale Vertretung in den Kantonen SG, TG, AR, AI, GL sowie im Fürstentum Liechtenstein von «Stand by You Schweiz».

Die gemeinnützige Organisation unterstützt Angehörige und Vertraute von Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen. Sie hat zum Ziel, das Solidaritätsnetzwerke unter den Angehörigen zu stärken, die Unterstützungsangebote für Angehörige und Vertraute zu erweitern und dazu beizutragen, dass die psychiatrische und sozialpsychiatrische Versorgung in der Ostschweiz wirksamer, nachhaltiger und menschlicher wird.

Name: Mudik Ke Hulu (MKH)
Description:
Founded in 2006 by Ustaz Pasuni Maulan, then Chairman of Masjid Tentera Di Raja and in collaboration with Pristine Clinic, Mudik Ke Hulu is a community driven initiative that provides safe and subsidized tattoo removal for Muslim individuals in Singapore.

With the support of MUIS, the Programme aspires to expand its reach and continue receiving strong support and encouragement from the wider Malay/Muslim community.

Since its inception, Masjid Tentera Di Raja has welcomed nearly 900 participants into the Mudik Ke Hulu programme. Participation trends have remained consistently encouraging over the years.

To date, we remain the only mosque in Singapore that provides tattoo removal services as part of a structured, holistic transformation programme.

As demand continues to grow, we strive to uphold high standards of quality, service, and care. Ensuring every participant receives the support, guidance, and treatment they deserve.

Name: Rien qu'un sourire
Description: "Rien qu'un sourire" est une association étudiante composée de 5 membres et qui se base sur l'ODD 4 "Education pour tous".  Notre association se dédie à soutenir les jeunes issus de milieux défavorisés en leur offrant un accès à une éducation de qualité, à travers un programme hebdomadaire d'aide aux devoirs personnalisé.

Name: Ass'solidarity
Description:
Ass'solidarity est une association étudiante engagée, basée à Lyon, dont la mission est de venir en aide aux personnes sans-abri et en situation de précarité. Créée et gérée par des étudiants dynamiques et solidaires, l'association se distingue par ses initiatives concrètes et humaines.

Nous organisons régulièrement des maraudes dans la ville de Lyon, où nous distribuons des repas chauds, des vêtements et des produits de première nécessité, tout en créant des moments de dialogue et de partage avec les personnes que nous rencontrons. Outre nos actions sur le terrain, nous mettons en place des événements de collecte de fonds et de sensibilisation pour mobiliser la communauté et encourager l’entraide.

Ass'solidarity repose sur des valeurs de bienveillance, de respect et d'engagement, et offre aux étudiants l'opportunité de s'impliquer dans des actions solidaires tout en développant un sens aigu de la responsabilité sociale.

Rejoignez-nous pour soutenir notre cause et contribuer à améliorer le quotidien des personnes les plus vulnérables de notre société.
